series_metadata.series_description: Letters appointing outside counsel for special counsel work. These letters have not been created since 2008 and were decorative. They did not serve as the official appointment of special counsel.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: One-Time Disposal of Obsolete Records: these letters are no longer created and hold no value to the office since these are decorative copies. The official appointment is the assignment letter within the Client File., Paper: Recycle
